_comment: The Scoreboard's ledger. During EVERY build, log each scoreable claim the issue prints (tracking numbers, odds, 'too new to call' verdicts, forecasts) as {issue, desk, claim, check_by (ISO date or event), outcome:null}. Each SATURDAY edition grades everything gradeable (outcome: 'right'|'wrong'|'push' + one-line result) and prints The Scoreboard from the graded rows. Prune graded rows older than ~3 weeks.

claims.claim: The Fed holds rates at the 28-29 Jul FOMC (no hike), per ~83% market-implied odds
MAS keeps policy settings unchanged at its ~27 Jul quarterly statement
Regime call: higher-for-longer, oil-driven inflation bid, firm dollar persists
Moonshot releases Kimi K3 open weights on 27 Jul as promised
DeepSeek legacy chat/reasoner API endpoints stop resolving after 15:59 UTC 24 Jul
Spider-Man: Brand New Day opens above US$180m domestic (31 Jul)
Dunearn House sells more than half its units on 25 Jul launch day
A Western major (NYT/BBC/Reuters/FT) runs a feature on China's guzi/emotional-value economy within ~4 weeks
The 10-day Gulf ceasefire proposal is not accepted by both sides within a week
